name: Genegantslet Golf Club
about: Genegantslet Golf Club is a family-owned and operated venue established in 1955, featuring a PGA-rated golf course redesigned in the 1990s. The course is situated in a valley by the Chenango River and is known for its manicured greens, open and flat fairways, and mountain views. It offers a welcoming environment for players of all ages and skill levels. The club hosts a variety of events and provides a full-service restaurant and banquet facilities. It also features a golf simulator bay available for use by members and guests.
why_golfers_like_it: Family-owned atmosphere with over 60 years of passion for the game
Scenic and accessible course layout suitable for all skill levels
Versatile event spaces for both indoor and outdoor celebrations
Location nestled in a valley with stunning mountain views

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant with banquet facilities available for events and dining.
Bar is open, available for events or for simulator players through May 2026.

simulator_hardware.notes: The venue features a Tru Golf simulator, but specific model details are not provided.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, it is standard practice to bring your own clubs for use with the golf simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full-service restaurant and bar, but policies on outside food and drinks are not specified.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: The estimated time for an 18-hole simulator session is not provided on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the course welcomes players of all ages and skill levels, making it a family-friendly environment.
